name: Mariana

transcripts.q3: Hi. My name is Mariana Rosco on. I enjoy working with children because I like helping them learn and grow, and being a positive influence in their lives. I have about two years of experience as a floater where I worked with children from 6 months to 12 years old. This helped me become flexible and comfortable working with different age groups and supporting their needs. I'm excited to continue growing and working with children.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Phoenix near 35th Avenue and Van Buren 8500 9.
transcripts.q5: My availability is currently part time and I am able to work flexible hours. Starting April 21st, I will be attending school from 8:30 a.m. to 2:30 p.m., so I will continue to be available for part-time, work outside of those hours.
transcripts.q6: If one child hits another, I would first, make sure both children are safe and separated. I would calmly check on the child who was her and make sure they are okay. Then I will talk to the child who hit helping them understand that hitting is that okay? And guiding them to use their words instead. I would also give them a chance to explain what happened. After that I would help both children, communicate and resolve the situation in a positive way depending on their age, I would also inform the teacher or follow classroom procedures if needed.
transcripts.q7: I believe I would make a great up kid teacher because I'm patient caring and enjoy working with children. I have about two years of experience as a folder which helped me learn how to work with different age groups and adapt to a different classroom environments. I'm reliable flexible. And always try to create a safe and positive space where children feel comfortable and supported. I also enjoy helping them learn grow and build confidence. Overall, I'm passionate about working with kids and I'm always willing to learn and improve.

ai_summary: Mariana is an experienced floater with two years of childcare experience working with children from 6 months to 12 years, seeking part-time work in Phoenix. She demonstrates strong patience, flexibility, and conflict resolution skills with availability around her school schedule starting April 21st.
